auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Outline API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage keys in your Outline workspace under Settings -> API Keys: https://docs.getoutline.com/s/guide/doc/api-1rEIXDfLF6.

extraFields.label: Base URL
extraFields.description: Optional Outline API base URL. Use the cloud default, or your self-hosted Outline URL ending in /api.

actions.name: get_collection
actions.description: Retrieve one Outline collection by its UUID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the collection.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Outline collection.

id.description: The unique identifier for the collection.

description.description: The collection description, which may contain markdown.

direction.description: The collection sort direction returned by Outline.

sort.description: The collection sort metadata returned by Outline.

index.description: The sidebar index for the collection.

color.description: The HEX color associated with the collection.

icon.description: The icon or emoji associated with the collection.

permission.description: The collection permission returned by Outline.

sharing.description: Whether sharing is enabled for the collection.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was last updated.

anyOf.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was archived, or null when active.
The ISO timestamp when the collection was deleted, or null when active.

raw.description: The raw collection object returned by Outline.

collection.description: One Outline collection returned by collection endpoints.

actions.name: get_document
actions.description: Retrieve one Outline document by UUID or urlId, or by shareId when reading through a share link context.

id.description: The document UUID or short urlId accepted by Outline.

shareId.description: The share UUID used to resolve a shared document.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Outline document.

id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier for the associated collection.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier for the parent document, or null when the document is at the root level.

fullWidth.description: Whether the document is displayed in full width.

anyOf.description: The emoji associated with the document, or null when not set.

text.description: The markdown document body returned by Outline.

urlId.description: The short document URL identifier returned by Outline.

anyOf.description: The template identifier when the document was created from a template, or null when not set.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL for the user.

email.description: The email address for the user.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last active.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

createdBy.description: One Outline user returned inside auth or document metadata.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL for the user.

email.description: The email address for the user.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last active.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

updatedBy.description: One Outline user returned inside auth or document metadata.

anyOf.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was published, or null when it is a draft.

dataAttributeId.description: The unique identifier for the associated data attribute.

anyOf.description: A string data attribute value.
A boolean data attribute value.
A numeric data attribute value.

value.description: A data attribute value returned by Outline, which may be string, boolean, or number.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when this data attribute value was last updated.

items.description: One document data attribute returned by Outline.

anyOf.description: The data attributes attached to the document.
The ISO timestamp when the document was archived, or null when active.
The ISO timestamp when the document was deleted, or null when active.

raw.description: The raw document object returned by Outline.

document.description: One Outline document returned by document endpoints.

actions.name: list_collection_documents
actions.description: Retrieve the document tree for one Outline collection by UUID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the collection.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Outline collection document tree.

id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

url.description: The document URL path returned by Outline.

children.description: The child nodes nested under this document.

items.description: One node in the Outline collection document tree.

tree.description: The document tree returned for the collection.

outputSchema.description: The Outline collection document tree response.

actions.name: list_collections
actions.description: List Outline collections the authenticated user can access, with optional search, status filtering, pagination, and sorting.

offset.description: The zero-based result offset to request.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to request.

sort.description: The field used to sort collection list results.

direction.description: The sort direction applied by Outline.

items.description: One collection status filter accepted by Outline.

statusFilter.description: Optional collection statuses to include in the results.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Outline collections.

id.description: The unique identifier for the collection.

description.description: The collection description, which may contain markdown.

direction.description: The collection sort direction returned by Outline.

sort.description: The collection sort metadata returned by Outline.

index.description: The sidebar index for the collection.

color.description: The HEX color associated with the collection.

icon.description: The icon or emoji associated with the collection.

permission.description: The collection permission returned by Outline.

sharing.description: Whether sharing is enabled for the collection.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was last updated.

anyOf.description: The ISO timestamp when the collection was archived, or null when active.
The ISO timestamp when the collection was deleted, or null when active.

raw.description: The raw collection object returned by Outline.

items.description: One Outline collection returned by collection endpoints.

limit.description: The maximum number of results requested.

pagination.description: The pagination object returned by Outline list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Outline collection list response.

actions.name: list_documents
actions.description: List Outline documents visible to the authenticated user with optional collection, user, parent, status, pagination, and sorting filters.

offset.description: The zero-based result offset to request.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to request.

sort.description: The field used to sort document list results.

direction.description: The sort direction applied by Outline.

collectionId.description: Optional collection UUID used to restrict the document list.

userId.description: Optional user UUID used to restrict the document list.

backlinkDocumentId.description: Optional document UUID used to filter documents that backlink to the specified document.

parentDocumentId.description: Optional parent document UUID used to list direct child documents.

items.description: One document status filter accepted by Outline.

statusFilter.description: Optional document statuses to include in the results.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Outline documents.

id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier for the associated collection.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier for the parent document, or null when the document is at the root level.

fullWidth.description: Whether the document is displayed in full width.

anyOf.description: The emoji associated with the document, or null when not set.

text.description: The markdown document body returned by Outline.

urlId.description: The short document URL identifier returned by Outline.

anyOf.description: The template identifier when the document was created from a template, or null when not set.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL for the user.

email.description: The email address for the user.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last active.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

createdBy.description: One Outline user returned inside auth or document metadata.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL for the user.

email.description: The email address for the user.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last active.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

updatedBy.description: One Outline user returned inside auth or document metadata.

anyOf.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was published, or null when it is a draft.

dataAttributeId.description: The unique identifier for the associated data attribute.

anyOf.description: A string data attribute value.
A boolean data attribute value.
A numeric data attribute value.

value.description: A data attribute value returned by Outline, which may be string, boolean, or number.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when this data attribute value was last updated.

items.description: One document data attribute returned by Outline.

anyOf.description: The data attributes attached to the document.
The ISO timestamp when the document was archived, or null when active.
The ISO timestamp when the document was deleted, or null when active.

raw.description: The raw document object returned by Outline.

items.description: One Outline document returned by document endpoints.

limit.description: The maximum number of results requested.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Outline document list response.

actions.name: search_documents
actions.description: Search Outline documents by keyword with optional scope, recency, snippet, pagination, and sorting controls.

offset.description: The zero-based result offset to request.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to request.

query.description: The keyword query used to search documents.

userId.description: Optional user UUID used to filter by editor.

collectionId.description: Optional collection UUID used to restrict search scope.

documentId.description: Optional document UUID used to search within a document subtree.

items.description: One document status filter accepted by Outline.

statusFilter.description: Optional document statuses to include in the search results.

dateFilter.description: The recency filter applied by Outline search.

shareId.description: Optional share identifier used to restrict search to a shared collection or document.

snippetMinWords.description: The minimum number of words to include in result snippets.

snippetMaxWords.description: The maximum number of words to include in result snippets.

sort.description: The sorting mode applied by Outline document search.

direction.description: The sort direction applied by Outline.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Outline documents.

id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier for the associated collection.

anyOf.description: The unique identifier for the parent document, or null when the document is at the root level.

fullWidth.description: Whether the document is displayed in full width.

anyOf.description: The emoji associated with the document, or null when not set.

text.description: The markdown document body returned by Outline.

urlId.description: The short document URL identifier returned by Outline.

anyOf.description: The template identifier when the document was created from a template, or null when not set.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL for the user.

email.description: The email address for the user.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last active.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

createdBy.description: One Outline user returned inside auth or document metadata.

updatedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the document was last updated.

value.description: A data attribute value returned by Outline, which may be string, boolean, or number.
